ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who requested the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Corporate Conference, Music Festival) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "event_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the event */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue (number of attendees) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue for mapping and location services */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue for mapping and location services */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of amenities available at the venue */,
  "booking_cost" REAL /* Cost for booking the venue */,
  "booking_currency" TEXT /* Currency for the booking cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the client's organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the client's company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the client's company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the client's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "ordblks" INTEGER /* Number of order blocks */,
  "keepcost" INTEGER /* Cost of keeping resources */,
  "hblkhd" INTEGER /* Head block header size */,
  "hblks" INTEGER /* Number of head blocks */,
  "uordblks" INTEGER /* Number of user order blocks */,
  "fordblks" INTEGER /* Number of foreign blocks */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource type */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the resource */,
  "resource_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the resource cost */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., Available, In Use, Reserved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "is_reusable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the resource type is reusable */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Lifespan of the resource type in days (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource detail */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource type */,
  "detail_name" TEXT /* Name of the detail */,
  "detail_value" TEXT /* Value of the detail */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the detail */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the resource detail is critical */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_details_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the team (e.g., Setup, Technical, Security) */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "responsible_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity within the venue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., Venue, Equipment, Personnel) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the cost */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost was incurred */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid, Partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_costs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Event Manager, Resource Coordinator, Data Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
